signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
signals.text: USD/JPY at 159.81 — 450bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains bid; Japan FinMin warns of decisive action on speculation. JPY COT LF net short −65,309 (crowded carry unwinds rapidly in risk-off). Intervention risk on a break above 160.00; 160.00 is the key intervention threshold.
evidence: Japan FinMin warns of decisive action

signals.title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: AUD/USD at 0.712 — HV30 at 8.2%, ATM IV at 9.4%; CFTC LF net long +41,675. Positioning stalling, options pricing a 1.2 vol-pt premium over realized; late-trend caution signal. A LF delta turning positive would invalidate the caution read.

signals.title: EUR — G8 Outperformance
signals.text: EUR weakest G8 currency this week (−0.498%, n=7 pairs); USD leads with +0.505%. Leader-to-laggard spread: 1.002%. EUR underperformance vs USD aligns with recent CB divergence.

signals.title: GBP/USD — CB + Technical
signals.text: GBP/USD at 1.3457 — BoE 3.75% vs Fed 3.75% — 0bp GBP carry neutral. GBP LF net long +28,426; AM constructive — positioning aligned with carry read. ATM IV 9.5% near HV; 25d RR flat — options neutral. Next resistance at 1.3500.

signals.title: NZD/USD — RBNZ vs OIS Divergence
signals.text: NZD/USD at 0.5847; RBNZ COT LF net short −17,090 vs 100% hike priced in OIS for 27 May meeting. Short-squeeze risk elevated if RBNZ delivers hike; positioning stalled at 0.5850. Watch 27 May RBNZ meeting for potential catalyst.
